RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Off Calendar. Matter already heard and decided on April 21, 2009. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Peter O. Larsen, Esq. of Akerman Senterfitt (904) 798-3700, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Anne Michelle Burr, Deputy Attorney General, State of California, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Defendant shifts the burden. Plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of fact on the first W.F.S. factor. The Court sustains Defendant State Board of Equalization's Evidentiary Objections as follows: Exhibits D&E are sustained; Exhibit G is sustained; and Paragraph 26 of Gary Adams Declaration is sustained. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
